summary: Frontend-only regression for Fork Fate's Dragon's Hoard theme + guided ritual + shuffle deck. All requested checks pass end-to-end with ZERO console errors. Fantasy hero background (fantasy-hoard-bg + fantasy-eyes + fantasy-firelight) renders. Guided ritual seal step on fantasy shows gold Swords icon (NOT skull), gold-accented card, TAP HERE badge, and bouncing 'Tap the card to seal your fate' hint (guided-seal-hint). Tapping the card hides the hint and triggers the shuffle. Full-screen shuffling-deck appears with 5 gold-bordered dragon-crest card-back elements and 'SHUFFLING THE DECK' gold label, then lands on a valid restaurant (Skylight Diner, 10001). Winter theme seal shows blue Snowflake on light card; Dark/Reaper shows red Skull on gothic dark card - ritual is properly theme-aware. GA4: window.gtag === 'function', window.dataLayer populated (6+ events on load). Assets /shuffle-dragon.mp3, /reveal-dragon.mp3, /turn-page.mp3 return HTTP 200. Rapid theme switching across cyber/steam/tiki/fall/summer/fantasy did not crash and produced no errors.
critical_code_review_comments: guided-seal-button animates in (bounce/scale), causing Playwright normal click() to see element 'not stable' and time out for ~30s. Not a user-facing bug (real users tap it fine), but consider limiting the entry animation duration or setting will-change so automated tests don't need force=true.
GuidedFlow.jsx (~402 lines) is approaching the 700-line guideline threshold; still fine but keep an eye on splitting per-step subcomponents as more themes are added.
test_credentials: None required. ZIP 10001 used for guided flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: For future guided-flow automation, click guided-seal-button with force=true because it uses an entry animation that Playwright's stability heuristic flags as not-stable. Also, theme dropdown menu should be clicked WITHOUT force=true (force=true occasionally fires the event without the React state actually toggling the menu open); a plain .click() opens it reliably. Reveal flow takes ~10-12s total; wait ~14s after tapping seal to capture the final result card. Preview URL: https://lucky-bite-1.preview.emergentagent.com. FF_BUILD 2026.06-267 was live during testing.
rca of the issue: N/A - no issues found. All flows behave exactly as specified in the review request.
